steps.title: Separate the two clauses
steps.content: The sentence needs one complete clause ending after "audience" and a new sentence beginning with the infinitive phrase "To do so." That phrase acts as the subject of "breaks the fourth wall."

steps.title: Reject faulty boundaries
steps.content: A adds the ungrammatical phrase "As to," B provides no boundary after "audience," and D creates a comma splice. The remaining choice uses a period and starts the infinitive phrase correctly. The answer is C.
